sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Garden Grove, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: launch window and pricing patience. Primary keyword: Garden Grove housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Garden Grove housing market; Garden Grove real estate market update; Garden Grove home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Garden Grove; Garden Grove home selling market; Garden Grove homes for sale inventory; Garden Grove days on market; Garden Grove listing price; Garden Grove seller market; Garden Grove housing market 2026; Garden Grove market update sellers; Garden Grove median home price; are home prices dropping in Garden Grove; is now a good time to sell in Garden Grove. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
